name: AstraProfile1200IP

comment:
IP65 1200W Profile Moving head, with 7000K LED source, 5° - 55° zoom,
The Astra Profile1200IP is an advanced, large format IP65 LED moving profile, engineered to be bright and offer robust performance under any indoor and outdoor conditions.
